title: At least 12 killed in latest Israeli attacks on Lebanon
snippet: At least 12 killed including a child in southern Lebanon. IDF hit 40 Hezbollah sites in past day. Day 15 of ceasefire. Cumulative: 2,618 killed, 8,094 wounded since March 2. Woman killed, children injured in separate attack. Ongoing ceasefire violations.
tag_reason: 5/1 Day 15 사상자(12+명)는 신규 — 검은 수요일(4/30, 28명) 후속이나 별도 일자
